text: **DrJill:** Hello, I'm Dr.
**DrJill:** Jill.
**DrJill:** {Welcome|ようこそ} to Let's Learn English with Anna.
**DrJill:** Today we {talk|話す} about {school|学校}.
**DrJill:** Schools are {wonderful|素晴らしい} places.
**DrJill:** Students can {study|勉強する} many things.
**DrJill:** English, math, and {science|科学}.
**DrJill:** They can study art, music, and {history|歴史}.
**DrJill:** But students do other things at school.
**DrJill:** They play, eat, and {exercise|運動する} too.
**DrJill:** What do you do in school?
**DrJill:** Let's {visit|訪問する} Anna.
**DrJill:** She helps us answer the question
**DrJill:** What do you do in school?
**DrJill:** I love to learn.
**Anna:** So I love school.
**Anna:** At school you can learn many things.
**Max:** I like to {study|勉強する} math and {computers|コンピューター}.
**Anna:** I like to learn about music and science.
**Anna:** In school, can I learn about {powerful|強力な} rulers?
**Anna:** Yes, Daisy, you can learn about them.
**Anna:** Can I learn about money?
**Anna:** Yes, that is a type of map.
**Anna:** I want to go to school.
**Anna:** That's great, Daisy.
**Anna:** I can learn to be {rich|裕福な} and {powerful|強力な}.
**Anna:** Great, Daisy.
**Max:** It is not Ravana.
**Max:** It is really not great.
**DrJill:** In school, sometimes we use {supplies|学用品} to help us learn
**DrJill:** Some are {common|普通の/一般的な|/ˈkɒmən/|This is a common mistake.}, like pens, pencils, paper, glue, and {scissors|はさみ|/ˈsɪzərz/|Use scissors to cut paper carefully.}.
**DrJill:** Some are special, like a {computer|コンピューター|/kəmˈpjuːtər/|I use a computer for homework.}
**DrJill:** But they all help us learn.
**DrJill:** Next, Anna shows us her {school supplies|学用品|/skuːl səˈplaɪz/|I bought new school supplies.}
**Anna:** This is my {backpack|リュックサック|/ˈbækpæk/|I carry my books in my backpack.}.
**Anna:** My school supplies are on the table.
**Anna:** School supplies, listen please!
**Anna:** I say your name and you get in my backpack.
**Anna:** Get ready
**Anna:** Notebooks, pens, pencils, get in my backpack.
**Anna:** Next
**Anna:** Eraser, ruler, in my backpack.
**Anna:** I packed my backpack.
**Anna:** Reach!
**Anna:** Scissors.
**Anna:** Tape
**Anna:** Stapler.
**Anna:** Laptop.
**Anna:** Dictionary.
**Anna:** Get into Anna's backpack.
**Anna:** My backpack is
**Anna:** Really full.
**Anna:** Now let's hear from some friends.
**Anna:** They talk about their {school days|学校生活|/skuːl deɪz/|I miss my school days.}
**Anna:** Daisy?
**Anna:** Max?
**Anna:** A little help?
**Students:** In school, I study math, English, and {Chinese|中国語|/ˈtʃaɪˌniːz/|I learn Chinese at school.}.
**Students:** My favorite {subject|科目|/ˈsʌbdʒɪkt/|Math is my favorite subject.} in school is art.
**Students:** My favorite subject in school is English.
**Students:** I go to {school|学校|/skuːl/|I go to school every day.} online so I can stay home.
**DrJill:** We talked about {subjects|科目|/ˈsʌbdʒɪkts/|Math is my favorite subject.} at school
**DrJill:** And we talked about {supplies|学用品|/səˈplaɪz/|I bought new school supplies.} for school.
**DrJill:** Now let's learn {rooms|部屋|/ruːmz/|These are different rooms in the school.} in a school.
**DrJill:** Let's see what happens in each room.
**Anna:** Max, can you send me to school with the {travel|旅行の|/ˈtrævəl/|We travel by car.} walkie-talkies?
**Max:** Yes, Anna.
**Anna:** No!
**Anna:** I want to go to school.
**Anna:** Oh no!
**Max:** Oh yes, Daisy went to school.
**Anna:** Max, show me Daisy at school.
**Anna:** Oh Max, she is in a {classroom|教室|/ˈklæsruːm/|Students learn in the classroom.}
**Anna:** Oh, you study in a classroom.
**Anna:** Classroom
**Students:** Sit down and open your {books|本|/bʊks/|I read many books.}
**Anna:** I forgot my book.
**Anna:** Now she's in the {library|図書館|/ˈlaɪbreri/|I borrow books from the library.}
**Anna:** You read in a library.
**Anna:** Library.
**Anna:** Mommy, mami, mommy, mommy, mommy.
**Anna:** Shh!
**Students:** Do not {sing|歌う|/sɪŋ/|I like to sing songs.} in the library.
**Anna:** Daisy is in the {gym|体育館|/dʒɪm/|We exercise in the gym.}
**Anna:** You exercise in a gym.
**Anna:** Gym.
**Students:** Line up.
**Students:** {Catch|捕まえる|/kætʃ/|Can you catch the ball?} the ball, flower.
**Anna:** Ow.
**Anna:** Uh-oh.
**Anna:** She is at the {principal's|校長の|principal's office} {office|事務所/オフィス}.
**Anna:** {Principal|校長}.
**Students:** {Daisy|女性の名前}, come in.
**Anna:** I did not do {anything|何も/何かを}.
**DrJill:** Join us {again|再び/もう一度|/əˈɡen/|Let's try again.} next time on Let's Learn English with Anna.
